toast.saveError: Failed to save actions to the device

devicesIndex.selectBody: Pick a device from the sidebar to view and edit its action configuration.
devicesIndex.emptyBody: Scan the local network for BleBox switches, or add one manually by IP.

deviceDetail.saveError: Failed to save actions to the device.
deviceDetail.loadError: Could not load actions from this device.

rename.title: Rename device
rename.description: Update the device's display name. Stored on the device itself, 1–31 characters.
rename.label: Device name

devicePanel.stateDescription: Current on/off state of the device's relay outputs.
devicePanel.loadError: Could not read the device state.
devicePanel.noRelays: This device has no relay outputs.
devicePanel.powerDescription: Live readings from the device's power-measurement sensor.

deviceDetails.title: Device details
deviceDetails.description: Identifiers and firmware version reported by the device.
deviceDetails.loadError: Could not read the device details.

firmwareUpdate.title: Updating firmware
firmwareUpdate.descriptionPending: This may take a few minutes. Don't power off the device.
firmwareUpdate.errorTimeout: The update didn't complete in time.

serviceConnection.title: Service Connection
serviceConnection.description: The device's own WiFi access point, used for setup. Turning it off once the device is on your network is recommended.
serviceConnection.loadError: Could not read the access point settings.
serviceConnection.toastError: Failed to update the Service Connection

remoteAccess.title: Remote access (cloud)
remoteAccess.description: Allow this device to reach BleBox's cloud so it can be controlled remotely.
remoteAccess.loadError: Could not read the remote-access setting.

deviceSettings.title: Device settings
deviceSettings.description: Per-device configuration toggles stored in the device's settings document.
deviceSettings.loadError: Could not read the device settings.
deviceSettings.toastError: Failed to update the device settings

manualAdd.title: Add a device manually
manualAdd.description: Enter the LAN IP address of a BleBox device.
manualAdd.companionError: Something went wrong while probing the device.

actionsJsonEditor.title: Edit actions JSON
actionsJsonEditor.description: Schema-validated editor for the device's configured actions. Removing an entry clears its slot. Applying updates the in-memory draft; use Save on the device page to persist.
actionsJsonEditor.schemaError: Does not match the action schema: {{message}}

actionsPanel.slotsFull: All 30 action slots are in use

wizard.newDescription: Define a trigger and the action it fires.
wizard.editDescription: Update the trigger or the action.
wizard.noFreeSlots: All action slots on this device are in use. Delete an action first.
wizard.urlRequired: A valid http(s):// URL is required to continue.
